topic.title: Assignment 3 Walkthrough
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Unfortunately, the lecture on January 24th did not record properly. To make sure you don’t miss any details, I’ve created a short video walking you through the Assignment 3 requirements once again.

Here's the link to the video: https://northeastern.zoom.us/rec/share/DFPA8l9orLKBZV4GgRB321K1kfHxaHWbUFb1X9aVIfxH8t6ec4gLJwvM67jOyLeu.6Px9mCesTnixixqw?startTime=1769463109000 
Passcode: 6@Ip7Bi4

 

Best,

Arundhati Bandopadhyaya

Teaching Assistant, INFO7375
